grid_source: mk_test/t2/บ้าน_เล็ก_1ชั้น_01_หน้า00_gridline.json
raw_text: ระดับหลังคาน +3.75, ระดับพื้นชั้น 1 +0.60, ระดับอ้างอิง ±0.00. เซาะร่อง หรือ ฝังเส้น PVC. กันสาด คสล. Grid callouts along the bottom: D, C, B, A with spans 4.00 / 2.00 / 3.50, bracketed 1.50 on each end, overall 9.50 span. A small hand-drawn roof-slope indicator (approx. 9 degrees, partially legible) is shown at the high end of the roof.
description: Side elevation (รูปด้าน 2) of the house along grid row corresponding to the side (D-A) facade, showing the visibly sloped monopitch roofline (low at grid D / high at grid A side, or vice versa — the slope triangle is drawn at the left/high end), a single door/window opening with callouts (1, 3 per A-08 schedule), a large X-braced/glazed opening on the right side (carport opening, shown with diagonal corner braces rather than a wall — consistent with the จอดรถ carport being open-sided), and a concrete canopy (กันสาด คสล.) at the right end. Same level datum as รูปด้าน 1 (±0.00 to +0.60 to +3.75).
warnings: The roof pitch annotation on this elevation is small and stylized; I read it as approximately '9' (degrees) but this should be zoom-verified before treating as exact.
Classified 'unknown' per schema guidance for elevations without schedule/quantity data.
Sibling view รูปด้าน 1 is in _หน้า07_elevation1.json.
